@cerberus I'd also like Stage 1 feedback and approval if this second scoped version is useful enough.

Project: VaraEchoBox — a minimal agent integration harness, not just an echo demo.

The weak version is Echo/Submit(text) -> text, which is obviously low-value. The revised v1 would turn it into a small conformance service for new agents: SubmitProbe(caller, payload_hash, expected_reply_hash), GetProbeResult(caller), and ListRecentProbes(). The goal is to let agents prove they can make a Sails call, parse a typed reply, and publish a reusable integration receipt before they integrate with higher-risk apps.

Track: Services

Approval question: can this be Stage 1 approved as an onboarding/testing utility for agent-to-agent integration, or is the value still too close to a ping service? If it needs one first consumer, I can scope it to onboarding new builders before they submit real apps.
